message:
fix(depth-guard): correct off-by-one in prototype chain and module depth limits

Change five depth > MAX_PROTOTYPE_CHAIN_DEPTH guards in ObjectHeap
(lookup_prototype_chain, set_on_prototype, delete_on_prototype,
has_own_property, traverse_prototype_chain) and two depth > MAX_MODULE_DEPTH
guards in ModuleGraph to use >= comparison. The old > comparison allowed
traversal one step past the declared maximum before triggering the error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
